programme.title: Firebite
programme.desc: When an Aboriginal man is kidnapped by vampires and a traditional vampire hunter goes missing, renegade fighters Tyson and Shanika realize there's some serious trouble going on in their town and they're the only ones that can help their community.

programme.title: Firebite
programme.desc: After finding the missing Blood Hunter and saving his life, Tyson and Shanika learn that the Vampire King has arrived in town; but after finding out about Tyson's past, Shanika starts questioning the truth about the night her mother went missing.

programme.title: Firebite
programme.desc: Tyson and Shanika arrive home to find Jalingbirri dead and their home destroyed by the Vampire King; Tyson wants to run. but Shanika vows to go down in the tunnels to find out if her mother is alive and being kept as a bleeder.

programme.title: Firebite

programme.desc: The detectives seek a murder witness (Vanity), unaware she works for Sonny's lover (Melanie Griffith), a madam; guest George Takei.

programme.desc: A foreign dignitary murders his rival then disguises the crime as part of a robbery blamed on college protesters.

programme.desc: A cunning advertising consultant leading a double life as a spy tries to cover up the details of a homicide.

programme.desc: An egotistic TV detective matches wits with Columbo after murdering his producer , a former lover and current blackmailer.

programme.desc: The curator (Joyce Van Patten) of a strapped family-owned museum stages a robbery, for insurance, then murders to hide her crime; guests Celeste Holm, Tim O'Connor.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An accountant, embezzling to support his wife's lifestyle, murders his partner after the man discovers his crimes.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A mystery writer uses her plot as a guide to murder her nephew , whom she blames for her niece's death.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the murder of a gourmet restaurant owner who had been the victim of an extortionist.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A TV-network executive murders her boss and lover when he fails to promote her.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo suspects a psychologist (Nicol Williamson), a noted expert in mind control, is guilty of murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An Irish poet, who fronts a peace organization while secretly running guns, kills an arms dealer who tries to swindle him.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A Hollywood director tries to fool Columbo when a studio becomes a murder scene.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The detective is called in to investigate the death of a sergeant major at a training camp.

programme.title: Columbo

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the disappearance of the director of a men's magazine.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The disheveled detective investigates the apparent suicide of a notorious racketeer who was facing an indictment.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: When a crooked estate agent dies in prison, his widow vows to exact her revenge on the two men that put him there. After killing her husband's informing boss, she sets her sights on Lieutenant Columbo.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A dentist frames his wife for a murder in order to keep up his image and expensive lifestyle.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A famous romance novelist is shot dead in the course of what looks like a robbery.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The rumpled lieutenant is invited to give a college lecture on criminology but ends up investigating the murder of one of the institution's professors.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the murder of a crime show host's rival with incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo is put to the test against an equally brilliant, criminal defence lawyer who murders his rock star girlfriend.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A police detective questions a jewelry-store owner whose late nephew had a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo attends his nephew's wedding and as the couple get ready to leave on their honeymoon, the bride disappears; Columbo investigates and suspects his nephew may have made a few enemies on the police force.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates a hit and run, followed by a car explosion.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Two women kill their two-timing lover but have solid alibis; one of the women tries to seduce Columbo to keep him off her trail.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates a case involving argumentative radio talk show host Fielding Chase.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The detective is put on the case of a man who murders his brother.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo matches wits with a forensics specialist, helping his girlfriend to frame her husband for a stock broker's murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The inimitable cop must prove that a flamboyant Hollywood gossip reporter was murdered by her former lover.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A Hollywood film composer and conductor murders a talented, young musician out of jealousy.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the apparent suicide of a tabloid reporter in the Los Angeles rave scene.

programme.title: Prescription: murder
programme.desc: A psychiatrist uses a patient, he is having an affair with to help him kill his wife. His perfect alibi may come apart at the hands of a seemingly befuddled LAPD lieutenant.

programme.title: Ransom for a Dead Man
programme.desc: Lt. Columbo (Peter Falk) outwits a lawyer (Lee Grant) who has killed her husband but made it look like a kidnapping.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A blackmailer interferes with a mystery writer's scheme to kill his former partner in a perfect crime.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the case of an unfaithful wife who was murdered when she refused to be blackmailed.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: No body, no weapon and a witness courted by the war hero she thinks committed murder, complicate a case.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo is caught in a case of stolen art and murder with evidence pointing to an innocent woman.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A competition between bitter siblings for ownership of a family-owned corporation, after their father's untimely death, escalates into murder.

programme.title: Blood Creek
programme.desc: Two brothers become entangled in a sinister Nazi's occult experiment at an American farmhouse.

programme.title: Captive Wild Woman
programme.desc: A mad doctor (John Carradine) turns an animal trainer's (Milburn Stone) ape into Paula the ape-woman (Acquanetta).

programme.title: Cherry Falls
programme.desc: A serial killer stalking virgins in a small Virginia town targets an idealistic teenager (Brittany Murphy).","large":"A small-town sheriff, Brent Marken (Michael Biehn), discovers the presence of a serial killer in his sleepy hamlet. Since the perpetrator has been targeting only virgins, both male and female, the deaths cause panic in much of the local high school population. Sheriff Marken's daughter, Jody (Brittany Murphy), is among the potential victims, since she has yet to sleep with her boyfriend, Kenny Ascott (Gabriel Mann). Can the lawman stop the killer before he goes after Jody?

programme.title: Cry Wolf
programme.desc: Mysterious murders occur when students (Lindy Booth, Julian Morris) at a prep school invent a story about a serial killer.

programme.title: Cucuy: The Boogeyman
programme.desc: A teenage girl under house arrest discovers that the nightmarish urban legend of the Mexican boogeyman, El Cucuy, is true.

programme.title: The Darkness
programme.desc: A supernatural force terrorizes a couple (Kevin Bacon, Radha Mitchell) and their two children after the young son brings home some mysterious rocks from the Grand Canyon.","large":"Peter Taylor (Kevin Bacon), his wife Bronny and their two children return to Los Angeles after a fun-filled vacation to the Grand Canyon. Strange events soon start to plague the family, including young son Michael's increasingly erratic behavior. The Taylors learn that Michael brought back some mysterious rocks that he discovered inside a cave. Unfortunately, something followed them home as the clan now find themselves in a battle with a supernatural force that preys on their worst fears.

programme.title: Dead in the Water
programme.desc: An all-female crew, on a boat in the middle of nowhere, must deal with an invader on their ship.

programme.title: Dead Man's Eyes
programme.desc: Blinded by acid thanks to his jealous model, an artist (Lon Chaney) needs eye tissue for an operation.

programme.title: Delirium
programme.desc: A man inherits a haunted house after spending time in a mental institution.

programme.title: Dementia 13
programme.desc: A mysterious masked killer terrorizes members of a family at a secluded estate.

programme.title: The Forest
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of her twin sister, a young American encounters the tormented spirits of Japan's mysterious and legendary Aokigahara Forest.","large":"When her twin sister disappears in Japan, a young American named Sara becomes determined to find out what happened to her. Sara's investigation leads her to the legendary Aokigahara Forest, located at the base of Mount Fuji. Accompanied by expatriate Aiden, she enters the mysterious wilderness after being warned to "stay on the path." Her investigation plunges her into a dark world where the angry and tormented souls of the dead prey on those who dare to explore the forest.

programme.title: Games
programme.desc: A mysterious woman (Simone Signoret) in black moves in with married Manhattan thrill-seekers (James Caan, Katharine Ross) and helps one trick the other.","large":"Wealthy and bored, Paul (James Caan) and Jennifer Montgomery (Katharine Ross) while away their hours in a New York City apartment filled with pinball machines and other amusements. The couple's routine is upended when door-to-door saleswoman Lisa Schindler (Simone Signoret) drops by and is suddenly taken ill. The Montgomerys let her spend the night. And soon, the sophisticated Lisa and her hosts embark on a new set of very adult -- and very dangerous -- games.

programme.title: Gone
programme.desc: A televangelist (Gregory Itzin) influences a confrontational man (Billy Burke) motivated by revenge.

programme.title: The Green Inferno
programme.desc: Student activists (Lorenza Izzo, Ariel Levy) crash-land in the Amazon and encounter an indigenous tribe of cannibals who'd like to have them for dinner.","large":"New York college student Justine (Lorenza Izzo), a lawyer's daughter, meets a student activist named Alejandro (Ariel Levy) when he goes on a hunger strike on behalf of underpaid janitors. Smitten, Justine agrees to help Alejandro undertake his next project: to save the Amazon. She soon learns to regret her decision when their plane crashes in the Peruvian jungle and she and the rest of their group are taken captive by a tribe of hungry cannibals.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Yuppies (Dwier Brown, Carey Lowell) with a baby hire a nanny (Jenny Seagrove), a druid witch who sacrifices babies to a tree.","large":"Optimistic about their future, well-off parents Kate (Carey Lowell) and Phil (Dwier Brown) hire the pleasant and lovely young Camilla (Jenny Seagrove) to live with them and care for their new baby. Though Camilla seems like an answer to their prayers, she proves to be more than she appears, and a diabolical plot involving the wellbeing of their child is uncovered. The young parents are forced to fight supernatural forces for the life of their vulnerable offspring.

programme.title: The Hitcher II: I've Been Waiting
programme.desc: A psychopathic hitchhiker (Jake Busey) terrorizes a man (C. Thomas Howell) and his girlfriend (Kari Wuhrer) as they take a road trip.","large":"Years after being traumatized by a hitchhiker, Jim Halsey (C. Thomas Howell) is trying to piece his life back together. After being suspended from the police force, he decides to return to Texas to speak with a friend about his problems. He reluctantly agrees to let his girlfriend, Maggie (Kari Wuhrer), join him. As they drive, Maggie lets a stranded driver (Jake Busey) into the car. Halsey becomes suspicious and kicks him out, but the stranger returns, undeterred, to wreak havoc.

programme.title: I Saw What You Did
programme.desc: Two teenage girls, bored while baby-sitting, make prank phone calls, completely unaware one of the people on the other end of the line has just killed his wife and now thinks the girls must be silenced.","large":"Kit (Sarah Lane) and her best friend, Libby (Andi Garrett), are two teenage girls bored while baby-sitting. To pass the time, they make prank phone calls, telling the person on the other end of the line, "I saw what you did, and I know who you are!" It's all in good fun, until they call a man (John Ireland) who just murdered his wife and buried her in the woods. Convinced they actually do know his secret, he becomes determined to find out who they are and silence them forever.

programme.title: Incarnate
programme.desc: Recruited by a Vatican emissary (Catalina Sandino Moreno), an exorcist (Aaron Eckhart) taps into the subconscious mind of a tormented boy (David Mazouz) to free him from demonic possession.","large":"After a single mother witnesses terrifying symptoms of demonic possession in her 11-year-old son (David Mazouz), a Vatican representative calls on wheelchair-bound scientist Dr. Seth Ember (Aaron Eckhart) to rid him of the evil spirit. Driven by a personal agenda rooted in his own tragic past, Ember enters the boy's unconscious mind where he confronts a demon as ferocious as it is ingenious.

programme.title: Karma
programme.desc: When recent college grad Manny has trouble making ends meet, his father-in-law offers him a job evicting delinquent tenants. Manny soon finds himself unleashing a karma demon which stalks him at every turn.

programme.title: The Keeping Hours
programme.desc: A lawyer sees the ghost of his dead son, which leads the man's estranged wife back into his life.

programme.title: Killer High
programme.desc: Sabrina's perfectly planned high school reunion goes south when a monster keeps killing all the guests.

programme.title: Boogeyman
programme.desc: Mike (Eddie McClintock), the town sheriff, has to battle the mythical Boogeyman after boys accidentally release it.

programme.title: Long Time Dead
programme.desc: A genie terrorizes London students (Lara Belmont, Melanie Gutteridge) after they unwittingly summon it with a Ouija.","large":"After a long night of dancing and drinking their way into a haze, roommates Rob (Joe Absolom), Liam (Alec Newman), Stella (Lara Belmont) and Spencer (James Hillier) and a few of their friends duck into a back room of the nightclub to play around with a Ouija board. None of the friends like what the board tells them: they will all die that night. Sure enough, one by one the young friends are slaughtered by a malevolent killer, amid revelations about satanic worship and sacrifice.

programme.title: The New Daughter
programme.desc: A single father (Kevin Costner) is puzzled by his daughter's (Ivana Baquero) weird behavior, which begins soon after he moves his family to a secluded woodland home.

programme.title: Nightmare
programme.desc: A guardian (David Knight) and his lover (Moira Redmond) stage grim scenes to drive a haunted English heiress (Jennie Linden) mad.

programme.title: Not Safe for Work
programme.desc: An office worker becomes trapped in a building with a killer.

programme.title: Phantasm II
programme.desc: Two psychically linked teens (James LeGros, Paula Irvine) cannot escape from the grave-robbing Tall Man of their nightmares.","large":"Years after surviving his encounter with the sinister Tall Man (Angus Scrimm), Mike Pearson (James LeGros), now a mental patient, still has nightmares about the evil gaunt mortician. Upon being released from the institution, Mike and his friend Reggie (Reggie Bannister) set out to track down the Tall Man and end his murderous and macabre practices. Also involved is Liz Reynolds (Paula Irvine), a pretty young woman who has a psychic connection to both Mike and the Tall Man.

programme.title: Psycho IV: The Beginning
programme.desc: Norman Bates (Anthony Perkins) phones a talk show and recalls his life as a 1940s teenager (Henry Thomas) warped by his mother (Olivia Hussey).","large":"Released from a mental institution once again, Norman Bates (Anthony Perkins) calls in to tell his life story to a radio host (CCH Pounder). Norman recalls his days as a young boy living with his schizophrenic mother (Olivia Hussey), and the jealous rage that inspired her murder. In the present, Norman lives with his pregnant wife, Connie (Donna Mitchell), fearing that his child will inherit his split personality disorder, and "Mother" will return to kill again.

programme.title: Rosewood Lane
programme.desc: Sonny Blake (Rose McGowan), a radio talk show therapist, moves back to her childhood home after her father dies. She is shocked to learn her neighbors are terrified of the paperboy (Daniel Ross Owens) who turns out to be a dangerous sociopath.

programme.title: Saint Ange
programme.desc: Strange events haunt a pregnant woman (Virginie Ledoyen) and others at a recently vacated orphanage in the French Alps.","large":"Anna is a cleaning woman who accepts a post at the St. Ange Orphanage. She arrives to confront an unsettling lack of orphans, save for one who acts far too childish for her age. Then the bizarre sights and sounds begin, which seem to elude detection by the only other servant or the gloomy institution's director. Is this all in Anna's mind? Or does something more sinister lurk in the heart of St. Ange?

programme.title: Session 9
programme.desc: Asbestos removal crews start work in an abandoned insane asylum, and strange happenings begin to occur.","large":"A tale of terror when a group of asbestos removal workers start work in an abandoned insane asylum. The complex of buildings looms up out of the woods like a dormant beast. Grand, imposing ... abandoned, deteriorating. The residents of Danvers, Massachusetts steer well clear of the place. But Danvers State Mental Hospital, closed down for 15 years, is about to receive five new visitors...

programme.title: SiREN
programme.desc: A man visits a supernatural nightclub during his bachelor party and inadvertently crosses paths with a dancer who is actually a terrifying, legendary creature.","large":"One week before his wedding day, Jonah and his groomsmen hit the town for a wild night of club hopping and debauchery. The night soon takes a twisted turn for the worse when the group is invited to a seedy underground club. After Jonah frees a seemingly imprisoned dancer, he realizes that the woman he released is actually a terrifying, legendary creature that will stop at nothing to claim her prey.

programme.title: The Skulls
programme.desc: A freshman (Joshua Jackson) joins an elite society that will guarantee him success, but he questions his decision when his reporter roommate dies mysteriously.","large":"For Luke McNamara (Joshua Jackson), an invitation to join the prestigious secret college organization, The Skulls, is a dream come true. But he soon comes to realize just how powerful The Skulls organization really is -- and that the truth, like success, comes at a very high price.

programme.title: The Skulls II
programme.desc: A new inductee (Robin Dunne) into the secret society witnesses a murder at the hands of one of its members.","large":"The Skulls, a secret college society whose influence reaches the highest levels of government and business, recruit Ryan Sommers (Robin Dunne), whose future success now seems all but assured. Then one day he sees one of his fraternity brothers kill a young woman -- a crime that Ryan must keep secret if he is to remain a Skull. While Kelly (Lindy Booth), a good friend, pushes him to follow his conscience, Ryan's girlfriend, Ali (Ashley Lyn Cafagna), surprises him by being against his snitching.

programme.title: The Skulls III
programme.desc: A young woman (Clare Kramer) gets more than she bargained for when she gains entrance to a males-only secret society.","large":"In this sequel, beautiful and determined college student Taylor Brooks (Clare Kramer) is intent on joining the secret society known as the Skulls, despite its history of being an organization consisting solely of men. Although she encounters strong resistance, Taylor takes steps toward being accepted into their ranks, but her efforts are derailed when her boyfriend is found dead. Taylor is considered the prime suspect. Can she clear her name and track down the real murderer?

programme.title: The Spider Woman Strikes Back
programme.desc: She (Gale Sondergaard) and her hulking servant grow bloodsucking plants, as a young woman (Brenda Joyce) finds out.

programme.title: Stephanie
programme.desc: After a mysterious global catastrophe, a young girl is left alone to hide from a malevolent power that stalks her home.","large":"A young girl is left alone in her house during a worldwide catastrophe and fearfully hides from a malevolent force that is stalking her. When her parents miraculously return, they try to settle back into normal life, but become increasingly concerned about something that has affected their daughter Stephanie.

programme.title: Virus
programme.desc: Passengers (Jamie Lee Curtis, William Baldwin, Donald Sutherland) on a sinking ship board a seemingly deserted Russian vessel containing a mutating alien force.","large":"Caught in a typhoon, a tugboat commanded by Robert Everton (Donald Sutherland) comes across a mysterious near-deserted ship. Excited to find a vessel that could be sold for as much as $30 million, Everton and his crew board and prepare to move the craft, despite the warnings of sole survivor Nadia Vinogradova (Joanna Pacula). When a malevolent alien presence begins killing off the crew, navigator Kit Foster (Jamie Lee Curtis) tries to convince the rest of them to leave before it's too late.

programme.title: Visions
programme.desc: After moving to a vineyard with her family, a pregnant woman experiences horrifying visions.

programme.title: Wer
programme.desc: In France, an American female attorney (A.J. Cook) defends a murder suspect who has a brutish appearance and a deadly secret.

programme.title: White Noise 2: The Light
programme.desc: After nearly being killed along with his family, a man recovers and realizes that he can sense when someone is about to die.","large":"A man's family is killed, but he survives -- barely. After recovering, he realizes that he has changed in some way: He now senses when someone is about to die. In his attempts to save people who are near death, he discovers there is a price to pay for interfering with the cosmos.

programme.title: The Wilding
programme.desc: A family tries to start over following a daughter's release from a mental health institution.

programme.title: 47 Ronin
programme.desc: A band of samurai sets out to avenge the death and dishonor of their master at the hands of a ruthless shogun.

programme.title: Blade of the 47 Ronin
programme.desc: Ancient Japanese Ronin warriors, set 300 years after 47 Ronin, in a modern-day world where Samurai clans exist in complete secrecy.

programme.title: Riddick
programme.desc: Left for dead on a sun-scorched planet, wanted criminal Riddick must confront two teams of mercenaries, one of whom is led by a man from his past.","large":"Left for dead on a sun-scorched planet, fugitive Riddick fights for survival against alien predators more lethal than any human he has yet encountered. His only hope for escape is to activate an emergency beacon, but that brings with it a different problem: mercenaries. The first ship carries an especially violent and lethal group; the second is led by a man from Riddick's past. With time running out, Riddick realizes that neither group will leave without his head as a trophy.

programme.title: Snow White and the Huntsman
programme.desc: Sent by an evil queen (Charlize Theron) to capture an escaped princess (Kristen Stewart), a huntsman (Chris Hemsworth) instead becomes the young woman's protector and helps her in her quest to regain control of her kingdom.","large":"Queen Ravenna (Charlize Theron), who seized control of her kingdom by marrying and killing its rightful ruler, needs the life force of young maidens to maintain her beauty. However, to become truly immortal, Ravenna must consume the heart of her stepdaughter Snow White (Kristen Stewart). Snow escapes, and Ravenna dispatches a huntsman (Chris Hemsworth) to capture her. But Snow, the Huntsman and a rebel army join forces to destroy Ravenna and restore the balance of life and death.

programme.title: Traffic
programme.desc: While a judge's (Michael Douglas) anti-drug campaign leads him to his own daughter, a DEA agent (Don Cheadle) targets a trafficker's wife, and a policeman (Benicio del Toro) fights corruption.","large":"A contemporary thriller set in the world of drug trafficking. Traffic evokes the high stakes and high risks of the drug trade, as seen through a series of interrelated stories, some of which are highly personal and some of which are filled with intrigue and danger.

programme.title: Alpha Dog
programme.desc: A teenage dealer (Emile Hirsch) and his friends kidnap the impressionable younger brother of a junkie who won't pay for the drugs.","large":"Teenage dealer Johnny Truelove (Emile Hirsch) and his friends kidnap the impressionable younger brother (Anton Yelchin) of a junkie (Ben Foster) who refuses to pay his drug debt. Things change unexpectedly when Frankie (Justin Timberlake), one of Johnny's pals, befriends the youth.

programme.title: BlacKkKlansman
programme.desc: Ron Stallworth, the first African-American police officer in Colorado Springs, Colo., works undercover to infiltrate the Ku Klux Klan in 1979. Stallworth and his partner Flip Zimmerman risk their lives to penetrate the KKK at its highest levels.","large":"Ron Stallworth is the first African-American detective to serve in the Colorado Springs Police Department. Determined to make a name for himself, Stallworth bravely sets out on a dangerous mission: infiltrate and expose the Ku Klux Klan. The detective soon recruits a more seasoned colleague, Flip Zimmerman, into the undercover investigation of a lifetime. Together, they team up to take down the extremist hate group as the organization aims to sanitize its rhetoric to appeal to the mainstream.

programme.title: Straight Outta Compton
programme.desc: In 1988, N.W.A (O'Shea Jackson Jr., Corey Hawkins, Jason Mitchell) revolutionizes music and pop culture with their brutally honest depiction of life in Southern Los Angeles.","large":"In 1988, a groundbreaking new group revolutionizes music and pop culture, changing and influencing hip-hop forever. N.W.A's first studio album, "Straight Outta Compton," stirs controversy with its brutally honest depiction of life in Southern Los Angeles. With guidance from veteran manager Jerry Heller, band members Ice Cube (O'Shea Jackson Jr.), Dr. Dre (Corey Hawkins), Eazy-E, DJ Yella and MC Ren navigate their way through the industry, acquiring fame, fortune and a place in history.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: In the dark about each other's true identity, two undercover agents (Denzel Washington, Mark Wahlberg) from competing bureaus go on the run together after an attempt to infiltrate a drug cartel goes haywire.","large":"For the past year, DEA agent Bobby Trench and U.S. Navy intelligence officer Marcus Stigman have been working undercover as members of a narcotics syndicate. The twist: Neither man knows that the other is an undercover agent. When their attempt to infiltrate a Mexican drug cartel and recover millions goes haywire, the men are disavowed by their superiors. Trench and Stigman must go on the run lest they wind up in jail or in a grave.

programme.title: The Adjustment Bureau
programme.desc: After glimpsing his future, an ambitious politician (Matt Damon) battles the agents of Fate itself to be with the woman (Emily Blunt) he loves.","large":"Just as he is on the brink of winning a Senate seat, politician David Norris meets a ballerina named Elise Sellas. Though David is instantly smitten, mysterious men conspire to keep him away from the beautiful dancer. David learns that he is facing the powerful agents of Fate itself, and glimpsing the future laid out for him, must either accept a predetermined path that does not include Elise or else defy Fate to be with her.

programme.title: Traffic
programme.desc: While a judge's (Michael Douglas) anti-drug campaign leads him to his own daughter, a DEA agent (Don Cheadle) targets a trafficker's wife, and a policeman (Benicio del Toro) fights corruption.","large":"A contemporary thriller set in the world of drug trafficking. With guidance from veteran manager Jerry Heller, band members Ice Cube (O'Shea Jackson Jr.), Dr. Dre (Corey Hawkins), Eazy-E, DJ Yella and MC Ren navigate their way through the industry, acquiring fame, fortune and a place in history.

programme.title: Parenthood
programme.desc: A middle-class man (Steve Martin), his wife (Mary Steenburgen), his father and a divorcee (Dianne Wiest) try to be good parents.","large":"Perfectionist Gil Buckman (Steve Martin) struggles with the deficiencies of his children, thinking they reflect poorly on his parenting -- and Gil's siblings only add to the stress of his life. One of his sisters (Dianne Wiest) faces difficulty when her teenage daughter (Martha Plimpton) becomes pregnant. Another (Harley Jane Kozak) clashes with her husband (Rick Moranis) when she asks for more children. Gil's immature brother (Tom Hulce) turns up as well, with a young son he can barely handle.

programme.title: The Kids Are All Right
programme.desc: The teenage children of a lesbian couple (Julianne Moore, Annette Bening) seek out their biological father (Mark Ruffalo) and make him a part of their lives.","large":"Lesbian couple Jules (Julianne Moore) and Nic (Annette Bening) have been together for almost 20 years and have two teenage offspring named Joni and Laser, who were conceived via artificial insemination. Unbeknown to their mothers, Joni and Laser seek out their biological father, a restaurateur named Paul (Mark Ruffalo). Complications arise when the teens bond with Paul and invite him into their lives.

programme.title: Meet the Fockers
programme.desc: A man (Ben Stiller) fears the worst when he accompanies his fiancée's uptight father (Robert De Niro) and mother to meet his free-spirited mom and dad (Dustin Hoffman).","large":"Now that Greg Focker is "in" with his soon-to-be in-laws, Jack and Dina Byrnes, it looks like smooth sailing for him and his fiancée, Pam. But that's before Pam's parents meet Greg's parents, the Fockers. The hyper-relaxed Fockers and the tightly-wound Byrnes are woefully mismatched from the start, and no matter how hard Greg and Pam try, there is just no bringing their families together. This all adds up to a disastrously funny time of getting to know you.

programme.title: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: When a woman brings her boyfriend home for her sister's wedding, her father, a former CIA agent, takes an instant dislike to him.

programme.title: Little Fockers
programme.desc: As two clans descend on the scene of young twins' birthday, Greg Focker's moonlighting at a pharmaceutical company threatens to derail his position of trust with Jack, his uptight father-in-law.","large":"After 10 years of marriage and two children, it seems that Greg Focker has finally earned a place in the "circle of trust" of his uptight father-in-law, Jack. However, Greg is moonlighting with a drug company, which raises Jack's suspicions. As two clans descend on the scene of the young twins' birthday party, Greg must find a way through myriad misunderstandings to prove to Jack -- once and for all -- that he is worthy of being the next family patriarch.

programme.title: The Jackal
programme.desc: A jailed IRA operative (Richard Gere) helps the FBI track a masterful assassin (Bruce Willis) about to perform a political killing.","large":"During an FBI raid on a Moscow nightclub, the brother of Russian gangster Terek Murad (David Hayman) is killed. Murad wants revenge and hires anonymous hit man the Jackal (Bruce Willis) to kill FBI Deputy Director Carter Preston (Sidney Poitier). With the help of Russian agent Valentina Koslova (Diane Venora), Preston finds the only man who knows what the notorious Jackal looks like, imprisoned IRA terrorist Declan Mulqueen (Richard Gere), and forces him to help hunt down the hit man.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Hired to find a missing person in New Orleans, a merchant seaman (Jean-Claude Van Damme) becomes the prey of those (Lance Henriksen, Arnold Vosloo) who hunt men for sport.","large":"Chance Boudreaux (Jean-Claude Van Damme), a sailor skilled in martial arts, is employed to guard Natasha Binder (Yancy Butler) as she tracks down her father, an itinerant Vietnam veteran living in New Orleans named Douglas (Chuck Pfarrer). They soon uncover a sinister group of wealthy men who hunt the homeless for sport, paying them $10,000 if they can survive a crosstown journey. When Chance discovers that Natasha's father was one of their victims, he decides to destroy the evil hunters.

programme.title: Hard Target 2
programme.desc: A retired mixed martial artist (Scott Adkins) is offered one final bout, but he learns he has been tricked into becoming the target of a human hunt when he arrives for the fight.

programme.title: Carlito's Way: Rise to Power
programme.desc: A New York gangster (Jay Hernandez) forms an alliance with two criminals to become the most powerful drug kingpin in Spanish Harlem.","large":"After serving time together in prison, three gangsters from different backgrounds -- Carlito (Jay Hernandez), Earl (Mario Van Peebles) and Rocco (Michael Kelly) -- join forces and take over the lucrative heroin trade in Harlem, N.Y. However, their partnership with a gangster (Burt Young) is threatened when Earl's hotheaded little brother, Reggie (Mtume Gant), disrespects the mobster's son and then kidnaps him. A ransom goes out on Reggie's head, and the friends are forced to choose sides.

programme.title: Bulletproof
programme.desc: A mobster's (James Caan) goons pursue a fugitive underling (Adam Sandler) turning state's evidence to an undercover policeman (Damon Wayans) he once shot.","large":"A none-too-bright criminal, Archie Moses (Adam Sandler) works for drug kingpin Frank Colton (James Caan) and remains oblivious to the fact that one of his closest buddies is actually an undercover police officer named Jack Carter (Damon Wayans). After Moses accidentally shoots Carter, the cop must recover and then bring the two-bit thug in to take the stand against Colton. With Carter and Moses on far from good terms, however, the trip does not go well.

programme.title: Assault on Precinct 13
programme.desc: A cop must arm prisoners to help fend off an attack by gunmen who want to kill a gangster locked away in the crumbling station.","large":"While en route to prison, a bus carrying criminals Marion (Laurence Fishburne), Beck (John Leguizamo) and Anna (Aisha Hinds) is rerouted to Detroit's soon-to-be-closed Precinct 13 because of a dangerous winter storm. All communications with the outside world are cut off, and Jake (Ethan Hawke), an emotionally volatile police sergeant who is haunted by his past, is forced to work with the criminals in order to survive an attack on the precinct by a group of armed men.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: When actress Nellie Jefferson joins the wagon train, her incessant demands for special treatment grate on Hale and Hawks, but Wooster grows completely smitten with Nellie.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A blind man, his sister and young son meet up with the wagon train on the trail; they are trying to find a train that will let them travel to California; Saul is a qualified doctor and has hopes of starting a blind school.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Polish immigrant Joe Muharich tries to befriend and hopefully straighten out Johnny Kamen, a brash young man who doesn't take well to anyone giving orders to him.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: With his clever tall tales, old prospector Henry Shannon talks Charlie Wooster into coming with him to search for a gold mine; when Hawks finds out about this, he rides out after the two men, along with Shannon's grandson.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: With an increase of Sioux attacks on the stage, Slim suggests repairing an old road as an alternate route.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim Sherman represents the stage line in a contract with an outlaw's widow, who is also a secret investigator.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess come to the aid of a family of entertainers whose wagon breaks down as they travel East; unbeknownst to all, the family is being followed by a group of men who think the family is transporting opium.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess are in dire need of a housekeeper so the judge will allow them to keep Mike on the ranch.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: When Daisy takes Jess to the dentist in Cheyenne, Jess is deputized to transport a prisoner back to Laramie.

programme.desc: An outlaw-turned-stool pigeon is marked for murder by his old gang.

programme.desc: Hardie pursues a diamond necklace thief.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: An Army general announces he is taking over the wagon train; he's requiring all members to act as soldiers in helping him rescue a trapped cavalry garrison of 120 men who are otherwise likely to be murdered by hostile Utes.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Flint visits Elanor Culhane, an old flame of his once married to a notorious gunman.

programme.desc: Flint comes across four survivors of an Indian massacre, the two Ellison sisters and two Carder brothers.

programme.desc: Charlie Wooster's cooking goes from awful to god-awful; Hale demotes him and promotes his Chinese assistant to the train's chief cook.

programme.desc: Jess is unwittingly riding shotgun on a payroll stage that has been rigged to wreck; after the robbery, Jess trails the bandits to Billings.

programme.desc: Three soldiers held for murder are victims of their commander's unprovoked attack on Indians.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A deathbed wish, Flint's foster mother sends him to find her son Artie, who Flint has struggled to get along with; when Flint finds him, he's been questionably elected mayor.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Lord Bruce Saybrook, London millionaire, takes his family out west on a hunting trip hoping to repair his relationships; they learn more about each other than expected.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Lizabeth Ann Calhoun asks permission to join the train so she can avoid the advances of a young man she claims is in love with her.

programme.desc: Flint goes undercover in a gang.

programme.desc: Bettina May leads three generations of her family across the plains; members of the train become concerned with her over-bearing nature towards her family.

programme.title: Wagon Train

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Jeff Hartfield fears his sister's new boyfriend, Dallas, a threatening man who believes Jeff knows the whereabouts of a hidden stash of money.

programme.title: Wagon Train

programme.title: Wagon Train

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Chris and Duke try to rush a group to California despite inclement weather; Duke injures his foot, forcing him off the trail and into a cabin to heal up.

programme.title: Laramie

programme.title: Khoon Bhari Maang
programme.desc: Widow Aarti is trapped by Sanjay's plan to marry and kill her for her wealth. With help from her friend Nandini, she survives and fights back for justice and revenge.

programme.title: Pardes
programme.desc: Kishorilal arranges his westernized son's marriage to Ganga, brought from India to the USA, where Ganga forms a deeper connection with Kishorilal's foster son, Arjun.

programme.title: Aaj Ka Arjun
programme.desc: A brave villager stands up against a harsh landlord and must unite his fellow villagers to rescue his kidnapped nephew, proving that courage can spark a powerful community fight.

programme.title: Ghatak

programme.title: Toofan

programme.title: Sham Ghanshyam
programme.desc: Two brothers set out to avenge their father's death by targeting a corrupt collector, igniting a gripping story of justice, family loyalty, and the quest for redemption.

programme.title: Hum Hain Kamaal Ke
programme.desc: Nilamber and Pitamber are deaf and blind respectively, and together they attempt to solve a murder mystery, resulting in a number of comic mishaps.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Catch nonstop entertainment with back-to-back promos, music, and fun fillers from your favorite movies and shows. Perfect for binge-watching and keeping the excitement alive!

programme.title: Vanvaas
programme.desc: Starring: Nana Patekar,Utkarsh Sharma. Left behind by his sons, a dementia-stricken father begins a journey with an unlikely companion-a clever thief determined to help him reunite with his long-forgotten family.

programme.title: Vivah
programme.desc: Starring: Shahid Kapoor,Amrita Rao. Poonam, a traditional girl gets engaged to Prem. Their faith and love are tested when an accident occurs and Poonam might be scarred for life.

programme.title: Skanda
programme.desc: Starring: Ram Pothineni,Sreeleela. Renowned for martial arts, a young man is recruited by a secret agency. His mission: confront terrorists, face danger, and fight bravely to safeguard peace and innocent lives.

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: Starring: Jeet,Biswajit Chakraborty. Raja is hired to shoot a party leader but is instructed not to kill him. When the politician ends up getting killed by an unknown assassin, Raja becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Acharya
programme.desc: Starring: Chiranjeevi,Ram Charan. When Dharmasthali, a village, is ruled by some of the most powerful but corrupt leaders, a mysterious strangers shows up to end illegal practices and fulfil his comrade's wish.

programme.title: Autonagar Surya
programme.desc: Starring: Naga Chaitanya Akkineni,Samantha Ruth Prabhu. Surya a juvenile offender completes his education in prison and upon release embarks on his dream project. However he has to overcome numerous obstacles to turn his dream into a reality.

programme.title: Vedha
programme.desc: Starring: Shiva Rajkumar,Ganavi Laxman. Vedha and his daughter Kanaka are on a killing spree. They are being chased by a cop Rama, but they always manage to escape in the nick of time. Can Rama stop the killings?

programme.title: Entertainment
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Tamannaah Bhatia. Akhil, an underdog, discovers his deceased wealthy father. Attempting to claim inheritance, he finds a dog has inherited the wealth, facing comedic obstacles.

programme.title: Holiday: A Soldier Is Never Off Duty
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Sonakshi Sinha. Virat uncovers a terrorist plan to bomb Mumbai. He leads his team into action, risking everything to prevent catastrophe and defend the city.

programme.title: Shoorveer
programme.desc: Starring: Sai Dharam Tej,Rakul Preet Singh. Separated from his family as a child, Siddharth grows up hating his father. While searching for him, he falls in love with Sitara and pursues her.

programme.title: Encounter Shankar
programme.desc: Starring: Mahesh Babu,Tamannaah Bhatia. Shankar is an orphan child who is cared for by police officer Raja Rao. When the police officer's son Bharath kills a child, he takes the blame for it. Years later, he becomes an encounter specialist.

programme.title: Bhairathi Ranagal
programme.desc: Starring: Shiva Rajkumar,Rahul Bose. Bhairathi Ranagal explores Ranagal's journey-his origin, rise to power, and transformation into the most feared gangster of Ronapura, revealing who he was before the notoriety.

programme.title: Navarathna
programme.desc: Starring: Amith,Sharath Lohitashwa. Moksha, a photographer, finds an ancient necklace that brings ill fate to those who wear it. Under the guise of capturing rare birds, she goes into a forest and plans to dispose of the ornament.

programme.title: Maqbool
programme.desc: In Mumbai's criminal underworld, the lord of all lords is Jahangir Khan (Pankaj Kapoor). Those loyal to him include Maqbool (Irfan Khan), his chief. But Maqbool is in love with Nimmi (Tabu), Jahangir's mistress, who convinces him to be ambitious and take over the empire. After maneuvering potential rivals out of the way, Maqbool betrays Jahangir, murdering him in his own bed. However, it isn't long before both Maqbool and Nimmi are haunted by the ghosts of their treacherous deeds.

programme.title: Khuddar
programme.desc: Hari is forced to marry Seema, who dislikes his stepbrothers, Govind and Rajesh. When he goes to Mumbai, she displaces them to become beggars. However, destiny reunites them with Hari in a courtroom.

programme.title: Gumrah
programme.desc: Meena, who lives with her retired and widowed father in rural Nainital, is visited by her sister, her husband and her two children. Meena speaks of her love for Rajendra, a painter and singer, and Kamla, her sister, approves of her choice. However, before Meena can make a move, Kamla passes away leaving her children in the hands of Meena.

programme.title: Shor In The City
programme.desc: A film set in Mumbai, India. The movie revolves around the lives of three men who get caught up in the chaos of the city. The first story follows two small-time crooks who attempt to pull off a heist. The second story focuses on a struggling cricketer who gets caught up in a web of corruption. The third story is about a young couple trying to find their way in the chaotic city. As their lives intersect, they must navigate through the noisy and bustling streets of Mumbai to find their own paths.

programme.title: Time Pass
programme.desc: TIME PASS tells the story of a college student Vishal [Arjun Punj], who develops a passion towards Jenny [Mona Chopra]. In fact, Jenny also happens to be his family friend. Vishal is possessed with the idea of making love to Jenny.

programme.desc: A hotel musician's life takes a turn for the unexpected after his admirer's presumed suicide. Considered a prime suspect himself, he does some investigation and comes to realize that the case is far more twisted than it appeared.

programme.title: Fight Club
programme.desc: The movie follows an insomniac office worker who befriends a charismatic soap salesman, and together they start an underground fight club as a way to cope with their mundane lives. programme.desc: A supernatural thriller that tells the story of a magician haunted by a childhood memory of encountering a witch. programme.title: Ittefaq
programme.desc: Dilip Roy is a painter by trade and, despite possessing a beautiful wife called Sushma, he spends most of his time painting. On the day of their anniversary celebration, Dilip is late finishing a painting when a frustrated Sushma snatches the brush from his hand. Furious, Dilip strangles her to death, is arrested and sent to a psychiatric institute.

programme.title: Shor In The City
programme.desc: A film set in Mumbai, India. The movie revolves around the lives of three men who get caught up in the chaos of the city. The first story follows two small-time crooks who attempt to pull off a heist. The second story focuses on a struggling cricketer who gets caught up in a web of corruption. The third story is about a young couple trying to find their way in the chaotic city. As their lives intersect, they must navigate through the noisy and bustling streets of Mumbai to find their own paths.
